liberation and such lines, Head of an
Abbot (A Spiritual/Divine institution-
A Priest, Career in Divine lines.
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+SUN Career pertaining to atrocities and
benefits through mean deeds. for
such Native, male issue is a major
problem. solution : By performing
SHANTHI HOMA pertaing to
SATURN-RAHU. Profit being a
Messenger in Government/Royal
courts-a Royal servant.
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+MOON Career involving cheating and
cunningness. Film line is profitable
(photography of any such
equivalents). If jupiter is in 7th the
native enjoys profit at/the cost of
others, displeasing manners, Also
profit through evil-gods indicated.
Profit in slum areas-some of the
vices of such natives bring
obstructions in their prosperity
because of greediness.

74 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
DRAGON HEAD+
SATURN+MARS .. Power indicating career of audacity
pertaining to wheels-a rough-and-
touch type-native who gains power
through society subsequently
